ce applying the following
technologies and concepts:
 HTTP/HTTPS communications using the GET and POST methods for parameter passing
 A programming language such as Java, C/C++, Visual Basic or PHP
 In case of XML API, the guide assumes that you have basic knowledge of XML language
 Application designed in the above Language should be capable of capturing the ID (ID).
Normal API
Required Environment
In order to use the HTTP/HTTPS based API, you will need to have a system that has internet
connectivity on outbound port (HTTP). This connectivity may be direct to the internet, or may be
via a firewall or proxy server.
Additionally, should you wish to receive delivery reports (DLRs) from the ConnectOne system,
you must have a web server that is able to receive incoming requests from the Internet on port,
default (HTTP) (To change the port Unicel’s help would be required).
